case_title: REED, BENJAMIN JR. VS BANK OF AMERICA BRANCH#0288/LEGAL DEPT. 3017 et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REED, BENJAMIN JR. AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA BRANCH#0288/LEGAL DEPT. 3017 BANK OF AMERICA  WEST PORTAL BRANCH # 0288 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA BRANCH#0288/LEGAL DEPT. 3017

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REED, BENJAMIN JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA BRANCH#0288/LEGAL DEPT. 3017 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
